title: More Emerald Uses
description: This mod adds new uses for emeralds
body:
For the past 5 years, when Emerald were added, they didn't do too much. You could at least trade with villagers. So i made this mod to make Emerald more useful. This mod adds so much item such as armor, pickaxes ecc. Here is the list of all the items:
- Emerald Armor
- Emerald Sword
- Emerald Axe
- Emerald Pickaxe
- Emerald Shovel
- Emerald Hoe 
The crafts are the same as you would craft a normal tool. I hope you enjoy it!!!😊😊

NEW VERSION 1.0.1:
Pickaxe bug fixed so now it is an iron tier
